description: It's femininity celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair looks great when paired with ethnic clothes. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 1" Upper Ergonomically curved synthetic leather footbed with a padding below the heel for absolute comfort and style Synthetic leather straps with a toe separator to hold the foot in place Bead embellishments on the straps for ultimate style Outsole Durable textured and grooved rubber outsole in the forehoot and heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
